# Onboarding Checklist (new team member)

- [ ] Access to code repositories and CI tools
- [ ] Development environment configured
- [ ] Intro to project documentation (one-pager, roadmap, DoD)
- [ ] Assign mentor / onboarding buddy
- [ ] Overview session: architecture, monitoring, deployments
- [ ] Review of key processes (PR workflow, release process, incident response)
- [ ] First small task assigned and reviewed
